feed.title: Category: Redis | 唐微南的博客

entry.title: Ubuntu Server:PHP,Nginx,MySQL,NoSQL,Beanstalkd配置与安装
entry.content:
搭建 LAMP 环境是一件非常繁琐的事情，尤其是随着系统的不同，相应的配置也会有所差异。 以下是 LAMP 环境和一些其他服务的安装与配置，基于 Ubuntu 14.04 LTS。可用于开发环境， 因为本身不是运维人员，也不知道能否用于生成环境。

PHP 与 Nginx

安装： 

sudo apt-get install nginx php5 php5-fpm php5-cli

Nginx 在 Ubuntu 中的网页根目录为 /usr/share/nginx/html, 配置文件为 /etc/nginx/。

配置：

打开 /etc/nginx/sites-avluable/default 文件，取消注释：

``` location ~ .php$ {

    fastcgi_split_path_info ^(.+\.php)(/.+)$;
    # NOTE: You should have "cgi.fix_pathinfo = 0;" in php.ini

    # With php5-cgi alone:
    # ifastcgi_pass 127.0.0.1:9000;
    # With php5-fpm:
    fastcgi_pass unix:/var/run/php5-fpm.sock;
    fastcgi_index index.php;
    include fastcgi_params;

} ```

这样的话就可以通过nginx来执行php了，如果需要自动索引 index.php 文件，更改如下位置：

``` server {

    listen 80 default_server;
    listen [::]:80 default_server ipv6only=on;

    root /usr/share/nginx/html;
    index index.php index.html index.htm;

    # Make site accessible from http://localhost/
    server_name localhost;

    location / {
            # First attempt to serve request as file, then
            # as directory, then fall back to displaying a 404.
            try_files $uri $uri/ =404;
            # Uncomment to enable naxsi on this location
            # include /etc/nginx/naxsi.rules

} ```

重启 Nginx：

sudo service nginx restart

安装扩展：

搜索扩展：

apt-cache search php5-

安装扩展：

sudo apt-get install php5-curl php5-mcrypt php5-apcu php5-imagick php5-oauth

像 mcrypt 需要手动启用，启用扩展：

sudo php5enmod mcrypt

重启Nginx：

sudo service nginx restart

MySQL

命令安装： 

sudo apt-get install mysql-server mysql-client

在安装过程中会提示输入密码，输入密码就可以继续往下安装。

查看进程：

ps -aux | grep mysql

默认端口为：localhost:3306

安装PHP扩展：

sudo apt-get install php5-mysql

启动/停止/重启

sudo service mysql start/stop/restart

进入shell环境：

``` vagrant@vagrant-ubuntu-trusty-64:~$ mysql -u root -p Enter password: Welcome to the MySQL monitor. Commands end with ; or \g. Your MySQL connection id is 36 Server version: 5.5.38-0ubuntu0.14.04.1 (Ubuntu)

Copyright © 2000, 2014, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.

Oracle is a registered trademark of Oracle Corporation and/or its affiliates. Other names may be trademarks of their respective owners.

Type ‘help;’ or ‘\h’ for help. Type ‘\c’ to clear the current input statement.

mysql> ```

Memcache

命令安装：

sudo apt-get install memcached

php扩展：

sudo apt-get install php5-memcached

查看进程：

ps -aux | grep memcached

默认端口：localhost：11211

Redis

命令安装:

sudo apt-get install redis-server redis-tools

PHP扩展：

sudo apt-get install php5-redis

默认端口：localhost:6379

进入shell环境： ``` vagrant@vagrant-ubuntu-trusty-64:/usr/share/nginx/html$ redis-cli 127.0.0.1:6379>

```

MongoDB

安装：

sudo apt-get install mongodb mongodb-clients

php扩展：

sudo apt-get install php5-mongo

启动/停止/重启：

sudo service mongo start/stop/restart

默认端口：localhost:27017

使用shell环境： ``` vagrant@vagrant-ubuntu-trusty-64:/usr/share/nginx/html$ mongo MongoDB shell version: 2.4.9 connecting to: test Welcome to the MongoDB shell. For interactive help, type “help”. For more comprehensive documentation, see

http://docs.mongodb.org/

Questions? Try the support group

http://groups.google.com/group/mongodb-user

```

Beanstalkd

sudo apt-get install beanstalkd

默认端口：localhost：11300

PHP 扩展：https://github.com/pda/pheanstalk
